description_long: This is a modern city bus with a streamlined, rectangular body and a slightly sloped front windshield. The exterior is primarily gray with a bold orange swoosh graphic running along both sides, adding a dynamic visual accent. The bus features large, rectangular windows evenly spaced along the passenger compartment, providing ample visibility and natural light for riders. The front of the bus has a wide windshield, prominent side mirrors, and orange accenting on the lower bumper. The rear is flat with a large window and tail lights, while the wheels are black with silver hubcaps. The overall design suggests a vehicle built for urban passenger transport, prioritizing accessibility and visibility.
description: A modern gray city bus with large windows and orange side graphics, designed for urban passenger transport. It features a streamlined body, wide windshield, and prominent side mirrors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide windshield, orange-accented bumper, and large side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the orange swoosh graphic, five large rectangular windows, and two visible wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large rear window, tail lights, and a flat back surface.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the orange graphic, five windows, and two wheels visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: Five large, evenly spaced rectangular windows on each side, separated by vertical pillars, all of similar size and shape.
